jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Flipkart - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Flipkart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
